Actions.Text: AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO ENERGY AND TELECOMMUNICATIONS

Title: Relates to limiting rate increases that entail a return on equity for capital projects
Summary: Prohibits the public service commission from approving a rate increase that entails a return on equity for capital projects that is above the prevailing ten-year treasury rate plus one percent.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public service law, in relation to limiting rate increases that entail a return on equity for capital projects
